risk_rationale: No existing ui/ implementation to regress (only a placeholder README). This run establishes the ui/ scaffold conventions (framework, router, test runner) that subtasks 6.1.2-6.1.5 will build directly on top of, so correctness/consistency of the scaffold has above-average downstream leverage even though the code itself is minimal placeholders. No other module (engine/, api/, agents/) depends on ui/, and ui/ does not yet call any live API, so there is zero blast radius into existing Go/Python code.
backward_compatibility: N/A - no prior ui/ code or consumers exist.
rollback_plan: Single commit; revertable with git revert of the commit hash without touching any other module.
